description: Product ontology from symptom_index with train_100_v2-derived alias and few-shot support.

reviewer_domain_rules.rule5: 5. Do NOT add fever/temperature tasks unless fever, heat, chill, high fever, antipyretic use, or body temperature appears in evidence.
reviewer_domain_rules.rule6: 6. Do NOT add X-ray, TB, pneumonia, cancer, antibiotics, or lab/test tasks unless safety_flags, patient wording, or clinician agenda explicitly supports them.
reviewer_domain_rules.rule11_suffix: Ordinary sore throat, nasal obstruction, cough, runny nose, fatigue, or GI discomfort must not be marked urgent unless a safety flag is present.
